summary: Session Zero sheet tune-up for Wayn: swap Empathy/Physique tiers (Physique remains effectively +3 via racial +1), update High Concept, rename an aspect, replace Warrior of the Mind stunt with Mentor of the Mind, and rename Mental Mastery stunt to Deadly Calm.

changes.change: Swap Empathy to Good (+3) and Physique to Fair (+2); update High Concept; change aspect 'Master Martial Artist' -> 'Sage Swordsman of Jorrvaskr'; replace stunt Warrior of the Mind -> Mentor of the Mind; rename Mental Mastery -> Deadly Calm (mechanics preserved).
